title: quercus × ashei
intro: Quercus × ashei, also known as the Ashe juniper, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Quercus gambelii and Quercus graveolens. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and antioxidant effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Quercus × ashei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory function. Quercus × ashei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
